description: Create a GitHub Actions CI workflow that runs on push to master or main branches, on pull requests, and on workflow dispatch. The workflow has two jobs: one to find changed files and another to test hardware options and parallelism. The test job checks out the repository, sets up Bazel and Python 3.12 with caching, installs dependencies, and runs C++ tests and a sample simulation with different hardware and parallelism configurations. The workflow cancels any in-progress runs on the same branch and has a 30-minute timeout.
